text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Fan Fest over, our usual training
schedule resumes. One evening, I head back to
the academy, driven by a sense of unease I can't
quite place...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only to see Rudolf standing alone on the training
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tears trickle down her cheeks.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry that you had to see that. I should know
that bitter tears are no good to anyone.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I know now is the time to pick myself up and keep
moving forwards. I know... and yet here I am,
wallowing in self-pity.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I do not deserve to call myself the Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize instantly that she's talking about her
poor performance at the Fan Fest.
choice_data_list: You were just tired, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's not it, Trainer. I am not judging myself
merely by one race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This failure was the culmination of all of my deeds
prior to this point.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That is why it stings so fiercely.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have pushed myself to forge furiously ahead in
order to realize my vision.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have not hesitated to unfairly impose my will on
those around me if it would achieve my dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I implored them to believe in the Emperor's
strength. I assured them that I would lead them to
bliss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And where did all of that lead me? To the
shameful display you witnessed the other day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All the victories I have won so far will be worth
nothing if I stop now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My dreams lie in the future, after all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And yet, I've come to a halt.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All of my supposed majesty was exposed as
falsehood under the bright light of day.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
What the heck was that? Isn't she supposed to be
the Emperor?

text_block_list.name: Student Spectators
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen the President run so slow... What
happened?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I disappointed everybody who came to watch me
race, yourself included.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, worse—I betrayed them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I was never qualified to be the Emperor
in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks at me with anguish in her eyes. For the
first time, I can feel she's genuinely relying on me
and my judgment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thanks to the path we've walked together, I
know exactly what to say.
choice_data_list: You don't have to do anything.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list: You're the Emperor, no question about it.
You're the Emperor, no question about it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But how can you say that? I appreciate that you
are trying to encourage me, but twisting the truth
isn't kindness.
choice_data_list: The proof is right in front of you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Right in front of me? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All this time, she's been laboring under a flawed
understanding of what the Emperor needs to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that the Emperor needs strength, but it's
not the strength to carry everyone's burdens
alone that she needs—it's the strength to attract
and inspire others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the course Symboli Rudolf has charted so far
has proven beyond any doubt that she's capable
of that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Eh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, the sound of countless footsteps
reaches our ears.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President!

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Students
text_block_list.text: Preeeeez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What? But... why are you all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf lifts her head to see a crowd of
Tracen Academy students running toward her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help but notice that you were absent
from the student council meeting today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I started asking around to see where you might
be, and... well, it turns out that a great number of
students wanted to help.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see. I'm sorry for the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If this is about role assignment, I can have the
draft to you by—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That won't be necessary. I have taken care of it
myself, more or less.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian will chair the event.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I keep telling you, you should do it. I'm not much
of a speaker.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We have already discussed this. I will have my
hands full as general coordinator.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Both of those roles are usually mine. Why would
you...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, I see. You've given up on me after all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You've concluded that following my lead will not
guide you to bliss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well. If my people do not want me, I shall
yield the thro—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We are simply doing what we think is necessary,
nothing more.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I cannot possibly allow you to stand on stage
when you are still exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
After all, who else but the Emperor will inspire us
to dream?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The dorm leaders will help pick up our slack.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You got it! We'll be directin' the crowds before
and after the event!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I asked my dear ponies to pitch in too, and they
all happily agreed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Anything for the President, they said! You should
have seen how they fought over who got to do
what!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Please, there's no need to go to so much
trouble...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trouble? Who said it was any trouble?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We all know you're out there busting your butt
for us, President.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The whole class is psyched we finally get to return
the favor. Whatever needs doing, we'll hop-hop
right to it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And if you need any heavy lifting done, just leave
it to me and these guns! Look at 'em flex!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I... don't know what to say...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Has this reminded you yet, President?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We want to walk the path you walk—chase the
dream you chase.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We don't just want to sit on our hands and wait
for you to create a world of bliss. We want to
seize it with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So please don't think of us as sheep to be
protected.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're fully capable of running on our own two
feet!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're right. I see now...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How could I have forgotten? Thoughtless barely
begins to cover my behavior...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It seems I've gotten so used to relying only on
myself, I forgot how to lend an ear to those
around me.
choice_data_list: You should have more faith in them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I know.
choice_data_list: And in what you've accomplished so far.
And in what you've accomplished so far.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I know. I will.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Thank you, one and all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's eyes begin to glisten once again.
But this time, it's not tears that glimmer in her
eyes, but the light of a firm will.
